'''√dh-l-y''' ('''kadhalay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:maft|maft]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-l-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:maft|maft]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √dh-l-y
|-
! Lemma
| kadhalay
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thidhalay || jidhalay || shidhalay || kidhalay
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthudhalay || jujudhalay || shushudhalay || kukudhalay
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thudhalay || judhalay || shudhalay || kudhalay
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thudhalay || judhalay || shudhalay || kudhalay
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thedhalay || jedhalay || shedhalay || kedhalay
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothodhalay || jojodhalay || shoshodhalay || kokodhalay
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thodhalay || jodhalay || shodhalay || kodhalay
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thodhalay || jodhalay || shodhalay || kodhalay
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || dhalay || dhalay || dhalay || dhalay
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || dhalay || dhalay || dhalay || dhalay
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || dhalay || dhalay || dhalay || dhalay
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || dhalay || dhalay || dhalay || dhalay
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thædhalay || jædhalay || shædhalay || kædhalay
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathadhalay || jajadhalay || shashadhalay || kakadhalay
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thadhalay || jadhalay || shadhalay || kadhalay
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thadhalay || jadhalay || shadhalay || kadhalay
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shadhalay
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshadhalay
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishadhalay
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shadhalaynü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshadhalaynknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishadhalaynü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shadhalayshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshadhalaynkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishadhalayshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shadhalayro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshadhalaynkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishadhalayro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shadhalaymu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshadhalaynkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishadhalaymu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shadhalaysher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshadhalaynksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishadhalaysher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shadhalayng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshadhalaynkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishadhalayng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shadhalayya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshadhalaynkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishadhalayya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shadhalayyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshadhalaynkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishadhalayyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shadhalaynüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshadhalaynknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishadhalaynüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shadhalaynüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshadhalaynknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishadhalaynüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shadhalaynümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshadhalaynknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishadhalaynümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shadhalayshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshadhalaynkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishadhalayshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shadhalayshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshadhalaynkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishadhalayshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shadhalayshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshadhalaynkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishadhalayshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shadhalayronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshadhalaynkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishadhalayronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shadhalayroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshadhalaynkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishadhalayroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shadhalayromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshadhalaynkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishadhalayromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shadhalaymunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshadhalaynkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishadhalaymunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shadhalaymushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshadhalaynkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishadhalaymushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shadhalaymuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshadhalaynkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishadhalaymuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
